title: November 21, 2021 Dispatch Response Timeline
summary: Privacy-protected summary of the Waterbury Police call classification and unit-response timestamps recorded for Gina Gazvoda on November 21, 2021.

scope_limitations: Does not establish the time or cause of Gina Gazvoda's death

provenance.review_method: Direct review of a two-page agency-generated Call Summary Report
provenance.notes: The public page omits exact address, telephone information, responder identifiers, internal unit labels, and unrelated administrative fields.

page_citations: Waterbury Police Call Summary Report, CFS 2100123760, pages 1-2
redaction_notes: Exact premise address, phone information, responder identifiers, unit labels, and unrelated administrative fields are omitted.

revision_history.change_summary: Created structured record and local public route.
